overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character walking across elevated walkways in a rain-soaked Gotham City at night. The clip transitions from a covered glass-enclosed walkway to an open bridge with panoramic views of the city skyline, clock tower, and full moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated pedestrian walkway alongside glass atrium

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the covered elevated walkway, cape flowing behind him as he approaches the stairway

entered.detail: Large curved glass building with illuminated interior and metal framework
Green ornate lamppost with glowing light
Black metal safety railing along the walkway edge
White sign with text attached to scaffolding

segments.scene_description: Batman walks along a rain-slicked elevated walkway sheltered beneath a curved glass atrium. The environment is artificially lit with vintage street lamps lining the path. Construction scaffolding and banners are visible on the left as Batman approaches a metal stairway leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal stairway transition from covered walkway to open bridge

events.description: Batman ascends the metal stairs and emerges from the covered walkway onto the open bridge
Scene opens up to reveal the full moon and night sky, shifting from artificial lighting to natural moonlight

agents.ego_description: Batman climbing the metal stairs, transitioning from the enclosed walkway to the open-air bridge with the city skyline coming into view

entered.detail: Large bright full moon dominating the night sky
Gothic clock tower with illuminated clock face in the distance
Large industrial building with metal scaffolding and structures

segments.scene_description: Batman ascends the metal stairs, leaving the sheltered walkway behind. As he emerges onto the open bridge, the scene dramatically opens up to reveal a massive full moon and the Gothic clock tower in the distance. The lighting shifts from artificial to natural moonlight as rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated bridge with panoramic city views

events.description: Camera gradually pans right to focus on the industrial tower and neon billboard while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: Batman walking across the open bridge, surveying the Gotham City skyline and approaching the industrial district

entered.detail: Illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the industrial tower showing colorful graphics
Bright spotlight beam cutting through the night sky

segments.scene_description: Batman traverses the open bridge with the full moon illuminating the rain-soaked city. The Gothic clock tower stands prominently to the left while an industrial complex with glowing neon billboards looms larger on the right. The camera captures the expansive skyline as Batman continues his patrol across the elevated walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered, artificially lit corridor into a vast, moonlit urban expanse. It begins with Batman walking along a rain-slicked elevated walkway beneath a curved glass atrium, passing vintage street lamps and construction scaffolding. As he ascends a metal stairway, the camera leaves the enclosure behind and the scene dramatically opens up to reveal a massive full moon and a distant Gothic clock tower. The lighting shifts from the warm glow of the atrium to cold, natural moonlight as Batman traverses the open bridge through the falling rain. The view finally expands to encompass the wider skyline, contrasting the prominent clock tower on the left with an industrial complex and glowing neon billboards on the right.
